all.en: ANNUAL PERFORMANCE REVIEW — FISCAL YEAR 2025
all.zh: 年度績效評估——2025 會計年度

all.en: Employee Name: Daniel Whitmore
all.zh: 員工姓名：Daniel Whitmore

all.en: Position: Senior Marketing Analyst, Digital Strategy Division
all.zh: 職位：數位策略部門資深行銷分析師

all.en: Review Period: April 1, 2025 to March 31, 2026
all.zh: 評估期間：2025 年 4 月 1 日至 2026 年 3 月 31 日

all.en: Reviewing Manager: Patricia Lin, Director of Marketing Operations
all.zh: 評估主管：Patricia Lin，行銷營運處長

all.en: Overall Performance Rating: Exceeds Expectations (4.5 out of 5.0)
all.zh: 整體績效評等：超越預期（5.0 滿分中獲 4.5 分）

all.en: Mr. Whitmore has demonstrated outstanding initiative throughout the review period, consistently surpassing the key performance indicators established during his prior performance evaluation.
all.zh: Whitmore 先生在整個評估期間展現了卓越的主動性，持續超越其上次績效評估中所訂定的關鍵績效指標。

all.en: Key Accomplishments: He successfully launched three integrated digital campaigns that collectively generated a 27 percent year-over-year increase in qualified leads.
all.zh: 主要成就：他成功推出了三項整合性數位行銷活動，合計帶來合格潛在客戶較去年同期成長 27%。

all.en: Additionally, he delivered the quarterly analytics dashboard ahead of every scheduled milestone, earning formal commendation from the Vice President of Sales.
all.zh: 此外，他在每個排定的里程碑前皆提前交付季度分析儀表板，獲得業務副總裁的正式表揚。

all.en: Strengths: Daniel exhibits exceptional analytical reasoning, as evidenced by his comprehensive market segmentation report titled 「Emerging Consumer Cohorts in Southeast Asia」, which has since become required reading for the strategy team.
all.zh: 優點：Daniel 展現出卓越的分析推理能力，從其名為「Emerging Consumer Cohorts in Southeast Asia」的完整市場區隔報告即可佐證，該報告現已成為策略團隊的指定閱讀資料。

all.en: He is also widely regarded as a reliable team contributor and has provided informal mentorship to two junior analysts who joined the department in October.
all.zh: 他也被廣泛視為可靠的團隊貢獻者，並對 10 月加入部門的兩位資淺分析師提供了非正式的指導。

all.en: His written deliverables are consistently polished, accurate, and submitted in advance of agreed-upon deadlines.
all.zh: 他的書面交付成果始終精緻、準確，並在約定截止日前提交。

all.en: Areas for Development: While Daniel meets expectations in cross-functional communication, his presentations to executive audiences would benefit from greater conciseness and a sharper focus on actionable recommendations.
all.zh: 待發展領域：雖然 Daniel 在跨部門溝通方面達到預期，但他向高階主管簡報時若能更加精簡並聚焦於可執行建議，將會更具成效。

all.en: Furthermore, his delegation skills require continued refinement, as he occasionally retains tasks that could be assigned to capable team members.
all.zh: 此外，他的授權技巧仍需持續精進，因為他偶爾會保留可指派給能力勝任之團隊成員的任務。

all.en: Goals for the Next Review Cycle (SMART Format): First, complete a certified executive communications workshop by September 30, 2026, and apply the techniques in at least four board-level presentations.
all.zh: 下一評估週期的目標（SMART 格式）：第一，於 2026 年 9 月 30 日前完成一項認證的高階主管溝通工作坊，並將所學技巧應用於至少四次董事會層級的簡報。

all.en: Second, lead a cross-departmental analytics project that produces measurable cost savings of no less than 150,000 US dollars by the end of Q3 2026.
all.zh: 第二，主導一項跨部門分析專案，於 2026 年第三季結束前產生不低於 15 萬美元的可量化成本節省。

all.en: Third, formally mentor at least one junior team member through a structured six-month professional development plan.
all.zh: 第三，透過為期六個月的結構化專業發展計畫，正式指導至少一位資淺團隊成員。

all.en: Training Recommendations: The reviewing manager recommends enrollment in the Advanced Data Visualization seminar offered by the Pacific Institute of Business, as well as participation in the company-sponsored Emerging Leaders Program.
all.zh: 訓練建議：評估主管建議報名太平洋商業學院所開設的進階資料視覺化研討會，並參加公司贊助的新興領導人計畫。

all.en: Compensation Adjustment: In recognition of his sustained contributions, a merit-based salary increase of 6.2 percent will take effect on May 1, 2026, accompanied by a performance bonus equivalent to one month of base pay.
all.zh: 薪酬調整：為肯定其持續性的貢獻，將自 2026 年 5 月 1 日起生效一項以績效為基礎的 6.2% 加薪，並隨附相當於一個月基本薪資的績效獎金。

all.en: His eligibility for promotion to Lead Analyst will be reassessed during the mid-year review scheduled for October 2026.
all.zh: 他晉升為首席分析師的資格將於 2026 年 10 月排定的年中評估中重新審視。

all.en: Employee Acknowledgement: By signing below, the employee confirms that the contents of this evaluation have been discussed in detail and that any responses or rebuttals have been formally recorded.
all.zh: 員工確認：員工於下方簽名即表示確認本評估內容已詳細討論，且任何回應或反駁均已正式記錄在案。

all.en: Signatures: ____________________ (Employee, Daniel Whitmore)     ____________________ (Reviewing Manager, Patricia Lin)     ____________________ (Human Resources Representative)
Date of Review Meeting: April 18, 2026
all.zh: 評估會議日期：2026 年 4 月 18 日
